case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. YVONNE YVONNE EVANS ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-21-2020 CONTINUED TO JUL-21-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVANS, YVONNE YVONNE $1,287.70 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,287.70, SEE SCANNED DOC
